title: Can we install workspace templates programmatically?
excerpt:
Hi Everyone, 
I’m not sure if this is possible, but can we install specific workspace templates into a user’s account when a trigger occurs?

posts.author: aalnussairi (Ahmed Al-Nussairi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Everyone,

I’m not sure if this is possible, but can we install specific workspace templates into a user’s account when a trigger occurs?

For example: When an item is created, install a workspace template.

I know I can create workspaces, boards and items using the monday.com API, but I believe there are some limitations to what we can add to boards using the api (no automations, connected board limitations, etc.).

Best wishes,
Ahmed

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
@aalnussairi

That’s a great question! At this time, I’m afraid this is not possible as of yet - you will not be able to install a Workspace Template based on a trigger.

That said, I definitely see how this could be helpful in some use cases. I’ve moved your topic to the Feature Requests section so other users and developers can add their vote to implementing this feature I’m afraid it isn’t likely to be an option in the nearest future, however.

I hope this helps!

-Alex

posts.author: aalnussairi (Ahmed Al-Nussairi)
posts.cookedHtml:
@AlexSavchuk Thanks Alex!

I think this feature would be incredibly useful as it enables developers to really optimise workflows. Fingers crossed this request makes it to the roadmap!

Best wishes,
Ahmed
